author: vvo
subject: feat(retry strategy): new retry strategy
body:
Since the upgrade of algoliasearch client, there's a new retry strategy,
if you have seen more timeouts than usual. Let us know.

Ref new strategy:
https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-client-javascript/blob/586f0a99845af6ec1113876a95affaaed8b7b78a/ChangeLog#L3-L15
